note: Pool of FREE, no-key, deterministic avatar image URLs spread across many styles and two providers (DiceBear SVG + RoboHash). Each user is assigned ONE template by hashing their unique id, then their id is the seed -> avatars are stable, unique, varied, AND spread across endpoints so no single provider gets hit 50x at once. IMPORTANT: use SVG, not PNG -- DiceBear's PNG endpoint rate-limits hard under burst (a leaderboard loading ~50 PNGs at once gets ~2/3 throttled with HTTP 429). {seed} is replaced with the URL-encoded id. Verified 200 on 2026-06-16.
